issues.description: DSL is missing the first effect entirely. Card has two effects: (1) a passive/trigger effect during opponent's turn that restricts opponent attacks when this Character is rested, and (2) an activated main phase effect. Only the second effect is present.
The activated effect uses trigger 'Activated' but should specify the phase context. The text '[Activate: Main]' indicates this is a Main phase activation, not a generic trigger.

The action sequence is wrong. The card says 'You may rest this Character: Play up to 1 Character'. The rest action should be a cost/condition, not an action that must execute. The primary action is PlayFromHand; rest is optional and conditional.

effects.description: If this Character is rested, opponent cannot attack any card other than this Character
